goals: Verify the persistent memory worker service is running and healthy
Search for existing memories related to horse training observations
Retrieve a specific memory to review detailed information
Check the timeline around a particular memory to understand context
Get database statistics to understand the size and composition of stored memories

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and hands-on, approaches new technology with the same patience used in horse training - methodical and observation-driven.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in horse behavior and training but unfamiliar with AI memory systems. Does not know internal tool names or APIs, will describe goals in natural language.

end_condition: The user has verified the memory system is operational, explored existing memories about horse training, and reviewed database statistics to understand what information is stored.
